itin_education.hero_body_prefix: An ITIN is a tax ID number issued by the IRS. It lets you pay taxes and access financial services —
itin_education.benefit_available: Available to anyone, regardless of immigration status

itin_education.benefit_history: Helps you build a financial history in the US

itin_application_help.header_subtitle: We'll guide you through the process
itin_application_help.option_caa_desc: Faster, easier, and you keep your passport. We'll help you find one near you.
itin_application_help.option_mail_desc: Fill out Form W-7 and mail it with your original documents to the IRS.
itin_application_help.faq_time_q: How long does it take to get an ITIN?
itin_application_help.faq_time_a: Usually 7-11 weeks if you apply by mail. If you use a Certified Acceptance Agent (CAA), it can be faster and you don't have to mail your original documents.
itin_application_help.faq_mail_q: Do I need to mail my original passport?
itin_application_help.faq_mail_a: If you apply by mail directly to IRS, yes. But if you use a Certified Acceptance Agent, they can verify your documents in person and you keep your passport.
itin_application_help.faq_cost_a: The IRS doesn't charge for ITINs. However, Certified Acceptance Agents may charge $50-$100 for their services. We recommend using a CAA for convenience.
itin_application_help.faq_immigration_q: Will this affect my immigration status?
itin_application_help.faq_immigration_a: No. The IRS is legally prohibited from sharing your information with immigration agencies. Getting an ITIN has no effect on your immigration status.
itin_application_help.btn_skip: I'll apply later — continue with limited features

itin_pending.wait_reputation: Build your reputation in the community
itin_pending.faq_time_a: Usually 7-11 weeks if submitted by mail. Using a Certified Acceptance Agent can sometimes be faster.
itin_pending.faq_notify_q: How will I know when it's approved?
itin_pending.faq_notify_a: The IRS will mail you a letter with your ITIN. We'll also notify you in the app as soon as you add it.
itin_pending.faq_track_a: Unfortunately, the IRS doesn't provide online tracking. You can call 1-800-829-1040 after 7 weeks to check status.

elder_onboarding.hero_title: Step up as a circle leader
elder_onboarding.hero_body: Elders mediate disputes, vouch for new members, and earn rewards for helping their community thrive.
elder_onboarding.benefit_mediate_body: Help resolve conflicts and build trust in your circles.
elder_onboarding.benefit_honor_body: Build your reputation as a community leader.
elder_onboarding.benefit_badge_body: Display your status as a trusted community elder.
elder_onboarding.tier_junior_meta: Starting tier · 10 pts vouch · up to 3 cases
elder_onboarding.tier_senior_meta: 100 credits + 20 cases · 25 pts vouch · up to 5 cases
elder_onboarding.tier_grand_meta: 250 credits + 50 cases + 90% success · 50 pts vouch · up to 10
elder_onboarding.status_pending_body: We'll notify you once a council member reviews your application.
elder_onboarding.alert_not_eligible_body: Please meet all requirements before applying to become an Elder.
elder_onboarding.alert_error_body: Something went wrong while submitting your application.
elder_onboarding.faq_intro_body: These are the questions every elder gets asked. Tap any row to expand.
elder_onboarding.faq_responsibilities_a: Elders mediate disputes, vouch for new members, and keep their circles aligned with TandaXn rules. Most cases close in under 5 days.
elder_onboarding.faq_case_load_q: How many cases will I handle?
elder_onboarding.faq_case_load_a: Junior Elders take up to 3 cases at a time. Senior and Grand Elders can take more. You always choose which cases to accept.
elder_onboarding.faq_training_path_q: How do I move up tiers?
elder_onboarding.faq_training_path_a: Earn training credits by completing cases, attending council reviews, and maintaining a high success rate. Senior tier opens at 100 credits + 20 cases.
elder_onboarding.faq_earnings_a: Each resolved case pays $25 or more depending on severity. Grand Elders also receive a monthly stipend.
elder_onboarding.faq_removal_q: Can I be removed as an Elder?
elder_onboarding.faq_removal_a: Yes. Three failed cases, repeated escalations without resolution, or rule violations trigger a council review.
elder_onboarding.faq_appeals_a: Either party can appeal a ruling within 7 days. The council reviews appealed cases together — your ruling history is part of the record.

score_explainer.title: How your scores work
score_explainer.no_recent_explanation: No recent explanation for this score yet.
score_explainer.glossary_xnscore: Your XnScore (0–100) reflects payment history, completion, reliability, deposits, and engagement. Higher is better.
score_explainer.glossary_honor: Honor Score (0–100) measures your community standing through vouching, mediation, and disputes. Higher is better.
score_explainer.glossary_stress: Stress Score (0–100) tracks signs of financial pressure — late payments, tone, login drop-off. Lower is better.
score_explainer.glossary_mood: Mood Drift (0–100) tracks how you talk about your finances vs. your own baseline. Lower means stable.
